title: School App Upgrade in Progress
metaDescription: We are upgrading the Rosehill College school phone app to provide a better and more reliable experience for our whānau, students, and staff.

sections.heading: Upgrade in progress
sections.lede: We are currently upgrading our school phone app to provide a better and more reliable experience for our whānau, students, and staff.

sections.heading: What's happening
sections.html:
• The current school app will be replaced with an improved version.
  • More features and easier access.
  • Instructions will be shared as soon as the new app is ready.

sections.heading: Need to reach us in the meantime?
sections.text: Report absences on 0800 722 929, or contact the front office for anything else.
